openGraph.title: Pokemon Tools
openGraph.ogTitle: Pokemon Tools - Type Calculator & Weakness Finder
openGraph.description: Handy Pokemon battle tools in one place. Includes a type matchup calculator and a name-based weakness finder.

title: Pokemon Tools
description: A collection of handy Pokemon battle tools. Pick the one you need.

typeCalculator.title: Pokemon Type Calculator
typeCalculator.description: Set up to 3 defending types and instantly see 4×, 2×, ½×, ¼×, and 0× matchups.

weakness.title: Weakness Finder by Name
weakness.description: Search a Pokemon by name, pick a species, and instantly see its type weaknesses and resistances.

teamBuilder.title: Pokemon Team Builder
teamBuilder.description: Pick up to 6 Pokemon to build a team, analyze its overall weakness coverage, then save and share it.
